headlines.title: What You Need to Know About Aortic Tears and Bone Health
headlines.description: Dr. Ian Smith, physician and other of “The Last 15: Say Goodbye to Those Most Stubborn Pounds,” joins TODAY to share the warning signs of an aortic tear and breaks down how to improve your bone health.

headlines.title: Grand Canyon rafters report mystery illnesses on social media
headlines.description: The National Park Service is investigating a medical mystery after multiple people returning from river rafting trips in the Grand Canyon reported an unknown illness with flu-like symptoms that won't go away. NBC News' Morgan Chesky explains.

headlines.title: Katie Couric reveals recent diagnosis of transient global amnesia
headlines.description: Veteran journalist Katie Couric revealed she had recently been diagnosed with a case of transient global amnesia, which caused her to experience short-term memory loss. NBC News medical reporter Dr. Akshay Syal shares details on the effects of the temporary condition and possible warning signs.

headlines.title: How Much of Social Media Health Trends Are Backed by Science?
headlines.description: Health trends on social media promise to fix everything from sleep to weight gain but how much of that advice is backed up by science? NBC’s medical contributor Dr. Akshay Syal joins TODAY to separate fact from fiction on trends like issues with high cortisol, berberine supplements for weight loss, Japanese walking and more.

headlines.title: The best point-and-shoot cameras of 2026 are compact and easy to use
headlines.description: I tested nearly a dozen point-and-shoot cameras from Kodak, Fujifilm, Sony, Leica, and Ricoh to find the perfect balance of size and quality.

headlines.title: The best deals from Lululemon’s Summer Sale: Get up to 50% off
headlines.description: Save up to 50% on Lululemon’s bestselling activewear during the Summer Sale, including leggings, bags, shorts, t-shirts and more.

headlines.title: The best pill cutters and crushers to make taking meds easier
headlines.description: From ones with arthritis-friendly grips to travel-size options, these are the best pill cutters and crushers for managing medication at home.

headlines.title: This Staub baker set is on sale for under $60 right now
headlines.description: Sur La Table just marked down Staub’s Pastel Macaron Stoneware 2-Piece Rectangular Baker Set by 58 percent, dropping the price from $142 to $60.

headlines.title: At least 86 hospitalized with foodborne parasite spreading across the U.S., CDC says
headlines.description: Nearly 3,000 people have been sickened with a gastrointestinal illness called cyclosporiasis, a foodborne infection marked by intense, watery diarrhea, state health officials report.

headlines.title: Bijou Phillips receives kidney transplant after public plea for donor
headlines.description: “The voucher program found me a perfect match!” she wrote on Instagram.

headlines.title: Katie Couric diagnosed with temporary amnesia syndrome
headlines.description: The veteran journalist was diagnosed with transient global amnesia, which can cause sudden memory loss that can be rectified within hours.

headlines.title: Cyclosporiasis outbreaks: What to know about the foodborne illness and symptoms
headlines.description: The source of cyclosporiasis outbreaks is still unknown, but fresh produce is suspected.
